videos.title: Deflect Sales Objections Back to the Prospect: Real Responses
videos.description:
In this video, we discuss how to deflect sales objections back to the prospect. Instead of trying to overcome the objection by talking more about your product and company, deflect the objection by asking a question. Not only does this keep conversations going, but it will also help you to learn more about the prospect.

#salesobjections #objectionhandling #b2bcoldcalling #b2bsalestips 

Video 1 - Prospect-Focused Selling https://youtu.be/clWtIMDUVBA?si=SLNrx_0XRtjsdOLS
Video 2 - Prospect-Focused

videos.title: Cold Email Tip: Focus Less on You (More on the Prospect)
videos.description:
In this video, we discuss how to improve your cold emailing efforts by focusing your messages more on the prospect than on the product you are trying to sell. By flipping that around, you will decrease how quickly your emails get deleted and improve your ability to educate prospects on who you are, why they should talk with you, and why they might want to buy from you at some point.

#coldemailing #coldemailtips #coldemailmessages #b2bsalestips 

Video 1 - Prospect-Focused Selling https://youtu.

videos.title: Improve Cold Calls By Focusing on the Prospect
videos.description:
In this video, we show how to improve cold calls by making the call more about the prospect than about the product you are trying to sell. This approach is completely different from what most salespeople do, and this will not only improve your results, but it will make cold calling easier and less stressful.

#b2bcoldcalling #howtocoldcall #coldcallscript 

Video 1 - Prospect-Focused Selling https://youtu.be/clWtIMDUVBA?si=SLNrx_0XRtjsdOLS

videos.title: The Sales Takeaway: How and When to Use It
videos.description:
In this video, we discuss how and when to use a sales takeaway. We break this down by explaining what the sales takeaway is and then how and when to use it. It is a powerful sales tactic, but it can be a bit advanced, so it can help to have clarity on how exactly to use it, and we try to provide those details.
